actions.title: Add missing FK indexes on access_rights table
actions.plan:
1. Add index=True to diagram_id and user_id in AccessRight model
2. Generate alembic migration
3. Verify migration
actions.spawn_prompt:
In btcopilot, add missing database indexes to the AccessRight model.

File: btcopilot/btcopilot/pro/models/etc.py

Change lines 46-47 from:
```python
    diagram_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("diagrams.id"), nullable=False)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
```
To:
```python
    diagram_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("diagrams.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
```

Then generate an alembic migration:
```
cd btcopilot && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'add_indexes_to_access_rights'
```

Verify the generated migration contains two CreateIndex operations for access_rights.diagram_id and access_rights.user_id.

Context: check_write_access() and check_read_access() in btcopilot/btcopilot/pro/models/diagram.py:118-143 filter on these columns. Without indexes, every access check is a full table scan.

Acceptance criteria: AccessRight FK columns have index=True, alembic migration generated and correct.
actions.success_metric: AccessRight FK columns have index=True, alembic migration file exists with two CreateIndex operations

actions.title: Add missing FK indexes on personal models
actions.plan:
1. Add index=True to FK columns in Discussion, Statement, and Speaker models
2. Generate alembic migration
actions.spawn_prompt:
In btcopilot, add missing database indexes to the personal app models. These are FK columns that lack indexes, causing full table scans on joins and filters.

File 1: btcopilot/btcopilot/personal/models/discussion.py
Change line 24 from:
```python
    user_id = Column(Integer, db.ForeignKey("users.id"))
```
To:
```python

```

Change line 25 from:
```python

```
To:
```python
    diagram_id = Column(Integer, db.ForeignKey("diagrams.id"), index=True)
```

File 2: btcopilot/btcopilot/personal/models/statement.py
Change line 22 from:
```python
    discussion_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("discussions.id"))
```
To:
```python
    discussion_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("discussions.id"), index=True)
```

Change line 23 from:
```python
    speaker_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("speakers.id"))
```
To:
```python
    speaker_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("speakers.id"), index=True)
```

File 3: btcopilot/btcopilot/personal/models/speaker.py
Change line 18 from:
```python
    discussion_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("discussions.id"))
```
To:
```python
    discussion_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("discussions.id"), index=True)
```

Then generate an alembic migration:
```
cd btcopilot && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'add_indexes_to_personal_models_fks'
```

Acceptance criteria: All 5 FK columns have index=True, alembic migration generated with 5 CreateIndex operations.
actions.success_metric: All 5 FK columns have index=True, single alembic migration with 5 CreateIndex operations

4. Run tests to confirm nothing breaks
actions.spawn_prompt:
In btcopilot, remove dead commented-out code from the Pro copilot engine.

File: btcopilot/btcopilot/pro/copilot/engine.py

1. Delete line 10:
```python
# from cachetools import TTLCache
```

2. Delete line 103 (inside __init__):
```python
        # self._conversation_chains = TTLCache(maxsize=1000, ttl=3600)
```

actions.success_metric: engine.py has no commented-out code blocks, tests pass

actions.title: Remove redundant db.session.merge calls in User.set_free_diagram
actions.plan:
1. Remove two redundant merge() calls after add() in set_free_diagram
2. Run pro model tests
actions.spawn_prompt:
In btcopilot, remove redundant SQLAlchemy session operations in User.set_free_diagram().

File: btcopilot/btcopilot/pro/models/user.py

The method set_free_diagram (starting at line 142) has redundant merge() calls. After db_session.add(diagram), the diagram is already in the session — merge() is unnecessary and wastes a round-trip.

Change lines 148-155 from:
```python
        if not self.free_diagram:
            diagram = Diagram(user_id=self.id, name="Free Diagram", data=bdata)
            db_session = inspect(self).session
            db_session.add(diagram)
            db_session.merge(diagram)
            self.update(free_diagram_id=diagram.id)
            db_session.merge(diagram)
            db_session.refresh(self)
```
To:
```python
        if not self.free_diagram:
            diagram = Diagram(user_id=self.id, name="Free Diagram", data=bdata)
            db_session = inspect(self).session
            db_session.add(diagram)
            db_session.flush()
            self.update(free_diagram_id=diagram.id)
            db_session.refresh(self)
```

Note: add() + flush() ensures diagram.id is assigned (needed for the FK update on the next line). The two merge() calls are removed as redundant. The refresh() at the end is kept to reload relationships.

Run tests: `cd btcopilot && uv run pytest btcopilot/tests/ -x -q --timeout=60 -k 'free_diagram or set_free'`
If no specific tests match, run: `cd btcopilot && uv run pytest btcopilot/tests/pro/ -x -q --timeout=60`

Acceptance criteria: Two merge() calls removed, replaced add+merge with add+flush, tests pass.
actions.success_metric: No merge() calls in set_free_diagram, flush() used to materialize diagram.id, tests pass
